creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Good day.

Sat, Jan 05, 2008 at 12:00:26AM +0000, delphij@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: ports/sysutils/cfengine patch for bdb <= 4.3
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: delphij
> State-Changed-When: Fri Jan 4 23:59:00 UTC 2008
> State-Changed-Why: 
> I have just committed a newer version of cfengine which should have resolved
> this, thanks for your submission!

Thank you, the new port works and links to the correct BDB.  It took
me a bit long to confirm this, sorry.
-- 
Eygene
